description: A retailer calls to ask about the current stock level and lead time for a specific product.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product the retailer is asking about using its SKU or name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the product in the system.

nodes.task_description: Check the real-time inventory level for the product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds there are 500 units currently in stock.

nodes.task_description: Check for any incoming shipments of the product from suppliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a shipment of 1000 more units is expected to arrive in 5 days.

nodes.task_description: Inform the retailer of the current stock level and the expected arrival of the next shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the availability information to the customer.
